LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, JUL-13-2020 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION HELD. THE COURT PROVIDES DEFENSE COUNSEL THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF ONLY AS TO THE ISSUE OF THE NEW AUTHORITY CITED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AT TODAY'S HEARING. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL SEND DEFENSE COUNSEL A LIST OF THE NEW AUTHORITY. DEFENSE COUNSEL SHALL FILE THEIR SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF BY JULY 23, 2020 AT WHICH TIME THE COURT SHALL TAKE THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION TO ISSUE A WRITTEN RULING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR#5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)
ORDER DENYING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS PAUL MICHAEL AYURE, WILLIAM BALL, JACOB BARNEY, MATTHEW BECK, ANDREW BENDER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO PATREON, INC.'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. CCP 430.41 REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER MAY BE FILED. THERE IS NO ATTORNEY DECLARATION OR OTHER INDICATION THAT SECTION 430.41 HAS BEEN COMPLIED WITH. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 10, 2020. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS PAUL MICHAEL AYURE, WILLIAM BALL, JACOB BARNEY, MATTHEW BECK, ANDREW BENDER'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT:

Defendants' demurrer to Patreon, Inc.'s first amended complaint is ordered off calendar. CCP 430.41 requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. There is no attorney declaration or other indication that section 430.41 has been complied with. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. Defendants' response to the First Amended Complaint is now due by December 10, 2020.
